calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Voluntary Dismissal And Withdrawal Of Request For Trial De Novo As Moot
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeremy Friedman, 510-530-9060 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearances.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court asks questions; the matter is unopposed. Plaintiff argues and cites Calderon case. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEREMY FRIEDMAN'S Motion For Entry Of Voluntary Dismissal And Withdrawal Of Request For Trial De Novo As Moot.

Plaintiff Jeremy L. Friedman's motion for entry of voluntary dismissal and withdrawal of request for trial de novo as moot is unopposed and Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
